title: diphasium complanatum subsp. flabelliforme
intro: Diphasium complanatum subsp. flabelliforme, also known as the fan-leaved diplolepide, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of Diphasium complanatum subsp. flabelliforme include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
